name: Potential Malicious Activity Identified by Referrer URL
notes: This rule triggers when a referrer url attributed to potentially malicious activity is observed.
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following BB:DeviceDefinition: Web Servers
when the event context is Remote to Local
when the event category for the event is one of the following Application.HTTP Opened, Application.Request Successful, Application.Request In Progress
when any of URL Referrer (custom) are contained in any of Malware URLs - AlphaNumeric (Ignore Case), XFE ATPF-mw_url - AlphaNumeric (Ignore Case)
TD_list: APPLY Potential Malicious Activity Identified by Referrer URL on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:DeviceDefinition: Web Servers
AND when the event context is Remote to Local
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following Application.HTTP Opened, Application.Request Successful, Application.Request In Progress
AND when any of URL Referrer (custom) are contained in any of Malware URLs - AlphaNumeric (Ignore Case), XFE ATPF-mw_url - AlphaNumeric (Ignore Case)
RED_list: Event name: Potential Malicious Activity Identified by Referrer URL
Event description: Detects when a referrer URL attributed to potentially malicious activity is observed.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
